rationale: The citing paper explicitly frames its contribution as extending prior Wal-Mart entry research on incumbent outcomes, and the cited 2008 JMR paper is a directly relevant incumbent-impact study (“Dancing with a Giant”) on Wal-Mart entry effects and heterogeneity. Given the strong topical alignment (both focus on incumbent retailer performance responses to Wal-Mart entry) and exact DOI match in the references, this is plausibly a substantive prior-work anchor rather than an incidental mention.
